query:
INSERT INTO verification_outbox_dlq (
                id, event_id, event_type, event_version,
                aggregate_id, partition_key, payload, created_at,
                dispatch_attempts, last_error
            )
            SELECT
                id, event_id, event_type, event_version,
                aggregate_id, partition_key, payload, created_at,
                $2, $3
            FROM verification_outbox
            WHERE id = $1
